name: SocietyBee
subCategory: Billing, Accounting & Bye-Law Compliance for Co-operative Housing Societies
tagline: Let the Bee Manage, You Relax
businessDescription: SocietyBee is billing, accounting and bye-law compliance software for Indian co-operative housing societies, built for the CAs and treasurers who run the books, not for gate passes and visitor logs. Multi-society from one login, zero payment-gateway commission, and an AI assistant (BeeAgent) that reads your ledger and bye-laws.
targetAudience: CAs and chartered accountants managing housing society accounts
Treasurers and managing committee members of co-operative housing societies
Property managers and RWA administrators in urban India
